text: Happy Fourth of July! Our country has never been stronger. 🇺🇸 #MakeAmericaGreatAgain #July4th

I'm back at the White House and feeling great! Don't let COVID dominate your life. We have developed, under the Trump Administration, some really great drugs & knowledge. I feel better than I did 20 years ago!
The Fake News Media and Big Tech are working harder than ever to suppress information and get Sleepy Joe Biden elected. That will never happen! Our country is WINNING and will continue to WIN! 🇺🇸
